modalSet.name: Modal
modalSet.size: 2540x1944 (after R5: per-size W×H; repacked). RE-ATTACHED to Core page at x=0,y=12210 after being ORPHANED by external file change (installer re-run). Parent=Core confirmed.

bindings.fill: color/modal/bg (NEW semantic 809:2; Light #FFFFFF / Dark #1C1D23 — replaced color/bg/level-0)
bindings.structure_R5: Each variant = [Content (VERTICAL autolayout: Header + Body, gap spacing/32)] + [Footer], with frame primaryAxisAlignItems=SPACE_BETWEEN. So when content < minHeight: Content group top, Footer bottom, slack between (body NOT stretched — snaps to content). When content > minHeight: frame hugs, gap = spacing/32. Verified footer gapToBottom=20 (=paddingBottom) all sizes; Body height=34 (2 lines, snapped).
bindings.itemSpacing: spacing/32 (SPACE_BETWEEN min gap Content<->Footer; Content internal Header<->Body gap also spacing/32)
bindings.minHeight: R5 per-size: S=174, M=336, L=587, XL=587. primaryAxisSizingMode=AUTO (hug above floor). counterAxisSizingMode=FIXED (per-size width).
bindings.bodyLayoutGrow: Body layoutGrow=0 + layoutSizingVertical=HUG (body hugs content, does NOT pre-occupy space — footer-at-bottom achieved via SPACE_BETWEEN + Content group, not body fill).
bindings.title: text style LOCAL title/16B (Pretendard Bold 16) + fill color/text/title/primary. R1 canonical remote Title/16B rebind BLOCKED (see needsDecision).
bindings.body: text style LOCAL body/14R (Pretendard Regular 14) + fill color/text/body/primary. R1 canonical remote Body/14R rebind BLOCKED (see needsDecision).
bindings.footerButtons: local Button instances Size=XSM State=Default Variant=Primary/Secondary

R5 EXTERNAL FILE CHANGE (critical): between task turns the file was modified externally (installer/plugin re-run rebuilt Core page 5:5706 — page now full of installer '— Spec Dark' frames StatusBar/NavBar/Button/etc at y140+, page content extends to y~12010). This DELETED the Modal Usage frame (765:6149), Spec Dark frame (768:6186), and both detached examples (Ex3 766:6190, Ex4 767:6199), and ORPHANED the Modal set (763:9085 had no parent, floated to x28113). Recovery: 8 variant components survived intact inside the set; restructure/resize applied to them; set RE-ATTACHED to Core page at x=0,y=12210 (below current content). Usage + Spec Dark + detached examples must be REBUILT (see needsDecision).
needsDecision: R1 item1 BLOCKED (environment): canonical CAPITAL 'Title/16B' (S:023fa21970a45e112b93260bcea80e2f30923e61,1415:4) & 'Body/14R' (S:a104b2f07030a8cf4961b54707c97ef6f06d150d,1415:27) are REMOTE library text styles. Binding them (setTextStyleIdAsync AND sync textStyleId setter both) requires loading the target Pretendard font, which is NOT installed in the MCP/plugin runtime (loadFontAsync 'Pretendard' fails: family does not exist; importStyleByKeyAsync also fails: key not found). Local lowercase title/16B (Pretendard Bold 16) / body/14R (Pretendard Regular 14) are VISUALLY IDENTICAL and remain bound. Options: (a) user rebinds in Figma Desktop where Pretendard is installed — select modal title/body texts, apply canonical style (1-click); (b) localize/publish the canonical styles into this file; (c) accept local equivalents. Cannot be done from this runtime.

RESOLVED (R2, user decision): dedicated semantic token created = color/modal/bg (809:2, Light base/white / Dark gray-dark/100). All modal panels (8 main variants + 2 detached + 3 Spec Dark instances) rebound to it; foundation-direct gray-dark/100 override removed. No longer a decision item.

Ex3/Ex4 usage examples were DETACHED to compose complex bodies (radios/map/table) — Figma instance limitation. Confirm acceptable for review demo, or build as separate composed frames. (Main component set unaffected — real instances.)
Ex4 data table + map are REPRESENTATIVE MOCKUPS (plan §D: map = image placeholder; table = header text + divider + empty state) not real core Table instances. Confirm sufficient or swap later.

CRITICAL (R5) — Usage + Spec Dark + detached examples DELETED by external file change (installer re-run on Core page). Modal main SET (763:9085) survived (orphaned; re-attached to Core at x0 y12210) with all R5 resize/restructure applied. DECISION NEEDED: (a) rebuild Modal Usage (사용예시 4종) and Spec Dark frames from scratch on the current Core page, and where to place them (page was externally rebuilt, my prior y-coords are gone); (b) confirm the re-attach location x0/y12210 is acceptable or specify a target section; (c) note the installer likely runs periodically — Modal is NOT yet in the installer (build-components.ts), so manually-placed Modal canvas frames are at risk of being wiped again on next installer run. Consider adding Modal to the installer or placing it on a page the installer doesn't rebuild.
